feed.title: cpprefjp - C++日本語リファレンス

entry.title: via -- access_context::via : タイトル修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/meta/access_context/via.md b/reference/meta/access_context/via.md
index 4ba7e4d80..5b163c4f8 100644
--- a/reference/meta/access_context/via.md
+++ b/reference/meta/access_context/via.md
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # via
 * meta[meta header]
 * std::meta[meta namespace]
-* std::meta::access_context[meta class]
+* access_context[meta class]
 * function[meta id-type]
 * cpp26[meta cpp]

entry.title: unprivileged -- access_context::unprivileged : タイトル修正

diff --git a/reference/meta/access_context/unprivileged.md b/reference/meta/access_context/unprivileged.md
index 69a6b74d9..bd144d304 100644
--- a/reference/meta/access_context/unprivileged.md
+++ b/reference/meta/access_context/unprivileged.md
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # unprivileged
 * meta[meta header]
 * std::meta[meta namespace]
-* std::meta::access_context[meta class]
+* access_context[meta class]
 * function[meta id-type]
 * cpp26[meta cpp]

 # unchecked
 * meta[meta header]
 * std::meta[meta namespace]
-* std::meta::access_context[meta class]
+* access_context[meta class]
 * function[meta id-type]
 * cpp26[meta cpp]

entry.title: scope -- access_context::scope : タイトル修正

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # scope
 * meta[meta header]
 * std::meta[meta namespace]
-* std::meta::access_context[meta class]
+* access_context[meta class]
 * function[meta id-type]
 * cpp26[meta cpp]

entry.title: designating_class -- access_context::designating_class : タイトル修正
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/meta/access_context/designating_class.md b/reference/meta/access_context/designating_class.md
index a3744f47a..358d63176 100644
--- a/reference/meta/access_context/designating_class.md
+++ b/reference/meta/access_context/designating_class.md
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # designating_class
 * meta[meta header]
 * std::meta[meta namespace]
-* std::meta::access_context[meta class]
+* access_context[meta class]
 * function[meta id-type]
 * cpp26[meta cpp]
